channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Multimodal Context
channel.description: Latest Multimodal Context news in Context Engineering

item.title: GIST: Multimodal Knowledge Extraction and Spatial Grounding via Intelligent Semantic Topology
item.description: arXiv:2604.15495v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Navigating complex, densely packed environments like retail stores, warehouses, and hospitals poses a significant spatial grounding challenge for humans and embodied AI. In these spaces, dense visual features quickly become stale given the quasi-stati...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> instruction, vision, model, LLM, multimodal | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: M3R: Localized Rainfall Nowcasting with Meteorology-Informed MultiModal Attention
item.description: arXiv:2604.15377v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate and timely rainfall nowcasting is crucial for disaster mitigation and water resource management. Despite recent advances in deep learning, precipitation prediction remains challenging due to limitations in effectively leveraging diverse multi...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, attention, image, alignment, multimodal | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: The World Leaks the Future: Harness Evolution for Future Prediction Agents
item.description: arXiv:2604.15719v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Many consequential decisions must be made before the relevant outcome is known. Such problems are commonly framed as \emph{future prediction}, where an LLM agent must form a prediction for an unresolved question using only the public information avail...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> LLM, vision, model, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
